---
title: "Teaching"
---

## University Name

### Undergraduate
- **Course Title 1**: Brief description of the course, your role (e.g., Instructor, TA), and the semester/year.
- **Course Title 2**: Brief description of the course, your role, and the semester/year.

### Graduate
- **Advanced Course A**: Brief description of the course and your role.

---

## Workshops & Seminars

- **Workshop Title**: Summary of the workshop you led or developed.
- **Seminar Series**: Participation or organization of academic seminars.
